title: genista fasselata subsp. crudelis
intro: Genista fasselata subsp. crudelis, also known as a type of broom plant, is a shrub that belongs to the Fabaceae family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Genista fasselata subsp. crudelis include its ability to aid in the treatment of digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and even help in the management of diabetes. Traditionally, the plant has been used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be taken as a natural remedy for its medicinal properties.
